name: White Chocolate Orange Dream Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease a 15 x 10-inch (37 x 25 cm) jelly roll pan with shortening.
2. Cream together 1 cup (250 mL) Golden Crisco Shortening, brown sugar, eggs, and vanilla in a large mixing bowl until smooth and creamy. Gradually add flour, baking soda, and cinnamon, mixing until smooth. Stir in oats. Set aside.
3. Heat sweetened condensed milk, white chocolate chips, and 2 tbsp (30 mL) Golden Crisco Shortening on low heat, stirring often, just until melted and smooth. Stir in orange rind and nuts.
4. Press 2/3 of the oat mixture (about 4 cups/1 L) into the greased pan. Spread filling mixture evenly over crust. Sprinkle remaining oat mixture evenly over filling.
5. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until golden. Cool, then cut into bars. Makes: About 60 bars. Freezing: Excellent
